languages.text: "Dann hat er gelogen..." {n}Dunkle Wolken ziehen in Argentas Augen auf.{/n} "Lügen, Lügen überall..."
languages.original_text: "He lied, then..." {n}Dark clouds roil in Argenta's eyes.{/n} "Lies, lies everywhere..."

traits.locale_text: "Dann hat er gelogen..." {n}Dunkle Wolken ziehen in Argentas Augen auf.{/n} "Lügen, Lügen überall..."

languages.text: "Il a menti, alors... {n}Des nuages sombres s'amoncellent dans les yeux d'Argenta.{/n} "Des mensonges, des mensonges partout..."
languages.original_text: "He lied, then..." {n}Dark clouds roil in Argenta's eyes.{/n} "Lies, lies everywhere..."

traits.locale_text: "Il a menti, alors... {n}Des nuages sombres s'amoncellent dans les yeux d'Argenta.{/n} "Des mensonges, des mensonges partout..."

languages.text: "Mintió, entonces..." {n}Nubes oscuras se agitan en los ojos de Argenta.{/n} "Mentiras, mentiras por todas partes..."
languages.original_text: "He lied, then..." {n}Dark clouds roil in Argenta's eyes.{/n} "Lies, lies everywhere..."

traits.locale_text: "Mintió, entonces..." {n}Nubes oscuras se agitan en los ojos de Argenta.{/n} "Mentiras, mentiras por todas partes..."

languages.text: "Yalan söyledi, o zaman..." {n}Argenta'nın gözlerinde kara bulutlar dolaşıyor.{/n} "Yalanlar, her yerde yalanlar..."
